title: verbascum × beckii
intro: Verbascum × beckii, also known as the mullein mule, is a hybrid flowering plant belonging to the mullein genus. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × beckii include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to alleviate skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × beckii include teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
